title: Ignited Memories
description: Face the darkness of forgotten memories. Ignited Memories is an addon for Management Wanted inspired by The Joy of Creation
body:
Ignited Memories is an expansion addon for Management Wanted inspired by the fan-favorite horror game The Joy of Creation.

Step into abandoned locations haunted by powerful Ignited animatronics. Explore dangerous structures, uncover hidden secrets, and overcome intense challenges as you venture into places consumed by fire, decay, and forgotten memories.

Unlike traditional exploration addons, Ignited Memories focuses on tension, survival, and high-risk encounters, creating a darker and more challenging experience.

Features

🔥 New Structures

Explore abandoned and ruined locations inspired by The Joy of Creation.
Discover burned buildings, forgotten facilities, and mysterious environments.

🤖 Ignited Animatronics

Encounter powerful new animatronics inspired by the Ignited variants.
Each animatronic presents unique dangers and challenges.

⚠️ Survival Challenges

Navigate dangerous areas filled with threats and obstacles.
Test your skills against some of the toughest encounters in the world.

🔍 Hidden Secrets

Search for hidden rooms, rare discoveries, and mysterious lore.
Uncover the truth behind forgotten locations.

🌎 Expanded Exploration

New structures generate naturally throughout the world.
Every journey may lead to unexpected discoveries.

🎮 Designed for Management Wanted

Seamlessly integrates with the core gameplay while adding a horror-focused experience.
